name: Broiled Marinated Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Mixed baby squash (zucchini, Yellow squash, Patty pan, Crookneck), split lengthwise
4 Baby Japanese eggplant, sliced into thirds lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the olive oil, light soy sauce, lime juice, minced ginger, garlic, and ground cumin seed together.
2. Place the marinated vegetables in a flat casserole dish, covering them completely with the marinade.
3. Broil for about 10 minutes until fully cooked and lightly browned.
4. Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
Note: Any part of the vegetables not covered by the marinade may burn. The leftover marinade can be used as a stir-fry sauce or gravy over rice or other dishes. You can also marinate the vegetables overnight, then grill them on a BBQ in a grilling basket.
